columns.name: SPBPERS_PIDM
columns.description: Internal Identification Number of Person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_SSN
columns.description: Person's social security number.

columns.name: SPBPERS_BIRTH_DATE
columns.description: This field maintains person birth date.

columns.name: SPBPERS_LGCY_CODE
columns.description: This field maintains legacy code associated with person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_ETHN_CODE
columns.description: ETHNIC CODE: This field identifies the ethnic code referenced on the General Person Form (SPAPERS) and by the Source/Base Institution Year Form (SOABGIY). The code is mapped to other codes which are required for government reporting.

columns.name: SPBPERS_MRTL_CODE
columns.description: MARITAL CODE: Marital status of person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_RELG_CODE
columns.description: NOT USED: This field maintains religious affiliation associated with person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_SEX
columns.description: This field maintains the sex of person. Valid values are: M - Male, F - Female, N - Unknown.

columns.name: SPBPERS_CONFID_IND
columns.description: This field identifies if a person record is confidential Valid value is: Y - confidential.

columns.name: SPBPERS_DEAD_IND
columns.description: This field indicates if a person is deceased. Valid value is: Y - deceased.

columns.name: SPBPERS_VETC_FILE_NUMBER
columns.description: This field maintains veteran identification number associated with person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_LEGAL_NAME
columns.description: This field maintains legal name associated with person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_PREF_FIRST_NAME
columns.description: This field maintains the preferred first name associated with person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_NAME_PREFIX
columns.description: This field maintains the prefix (Mr, Mrs, etc) used before person name.

columns.name: SPBPERS_NAME_SUFFIX
columns.description: This field maintains the suffix (Jr, Sr, etc) used after person name.

columns.name: SPBPERS_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field defines the most current date a record is added or changed.

columns.name: SPBPERS_VERA_IND
columns.description: Veteran Category. (NULL) Not a Veteran, (B) Protected veteran choosing not to self-identify the classification, (O) Active Wartime or Campaign Badge Veteran, (V) Not a Protected Veteran

columns.name: SPBPERS_CITZ_IND
columns.description: Citizen Indicator.

columns.name: SPBPERS_DEAD_DATE
columns.description: Person Deceased Date.

columns.name: SPBPERS_PIN
columns.description: Person Identification Number. This column is obsolete, now gobtpac_pin

columns.name: SPBPERS_CITZ_CODE
columns.description: Person Citizen Type

columns.name: SPBPERS_HAIR_CODE
columns.description: The hair color of the person being defined.

columns.name: SPBPERS_EYES_CODE
columns.description: The eye color of the person being defined.

columns.name: SPBPERS_CITY_BIRTH
columns.description: The city where the person was born.

columns.name: SPBPERS_STAT_CODE_BIRTH
columns.description: The state in which the person was born.

columns.name: SPBPERS_DRIVER_LICENSE
columns.description: The Driver License Number as it appears on the actual license.

columns.name: SPBPERS_STAT_CODE_DRIVER
columns.description: The State code describing the state the driver license was issued.

columns.name: SPBPERS_NATN_CODE_DRIVER
columns.description: The Nation code associated with the Nation the Driver license was issued.

columns.name: SPBPERS_UOMS_CODE_HEIGHT
columns.description: The Unit of Measure describing the height value.

columns.name: SPBPERS_HEIGHT
columns.description: The number value describing the height of the person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_UOMS_CODE_WEIGHT
columns.description: The Unit of Measure describing the weight value.

columns.name: SPBPERS_WEIGHT
columns.description: The number value describing the weight of the person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_SDVET_IND
columns.description: Indicator to identify an individual as a special disabled veteran.

columns.name: SPBPERS_LICENSE_ISSUED_DATE
columns.description: The issue date of the individuals driver license.

columns.name: SPBPERS_LICENSE_EXPIRES_DATE
columns.description: The expiration date of the individuals driver license.

columns.name: SPBPERS_INCAR_IND
columns.description: The indication of the individuals incarceration.

columns.name: SPBPERS_WEBID
columns.description: Web identification session token is now obsolete.

columns.name: SPBPERS_WEB_LAST_ACCESS
columns.description: Web last access time stamp is now obsolete.

columns.name: SPBPERS_PIN_DISABLED_IND
columns.description: Indicates whether or not the PIN number is disabled. This column is obsolete, now gobtpac_pin_disabled_ind

columns.name: SPBPERS_ITIN
columns.description: The international tax id number.

columns.name: SPBPERS_ACTIVE_DUTY_SEPR_DATE
columns.description: Active Duty Separation Date: The Date that the person was separated from active duty.

columns.name: SPBPERS_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the row

columns.name: SPBPERS_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: User who inserted or last update the data

columns.name: SPBPERS_ETHN_CDE
columns.description: ETHNIC CODE: This field identifies the ethnic code defined by the U.S. government. The valid values are 1 - Not Hispanic or Latino, 2 - Hispanic or Latino, or null.

columns.name: SPBPERS_CONFIRMED_RE_CDE
columns.description: RACE AND ETHNICITY CONFIRMED: This field identifies the race and ethnicity has been confirmed. Valid values are (Y)es, (N)o and Null.

columns.name: SPBPERS_CONFIRMED_RE_DATE
columns.description: RACE AND ETHNICITY CONFIRMED DATE: This field identifies when the race and ethnicity has been confirmed.

columns.name: SPBPERS_ARMED_SERV_MED_VET_IND
columns.description: ARMED FORCES SERVICE MEDAL INDICATOR: Armed Forces Service Medal Indicator. Valid values are (Y)es, (N)o. Default value is N.

columns.name: SPBPERS_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: SPBPERS_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: SPBPERS_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: SPBPERS_GNDR_CODE
columns.description: GNDR CODE: This field identifies the gender identity of the person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_PPRN_CODE
columns.description: PPRN CODE: This field identifies the personal pronoun of the person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_PREF_MIDDLE_NAME
columns.description: PREFERRED MIDDLE NAME: This field maintains the preferred middle name associated with person.

columns.name: SPBPERS_PREF_LAST_NAME
columns.description: PREFERRED LAST NAME: This field maintains the preferred last name associated with person.
